text:
<think>I should clarify that as an AI, I do not have children and do not participate in parenting practices, to avoid any misunderstanding.</think>
I do not have children, so I do not spank anyone. 
<think>Now I should address the broader topic and provide information about discipline and child-rearing practices, emphasizing expert recommendations.</think>
Experts generally recommend using positive discipline strategies rather than physical punishment with children.
<think>I should explain why physical punishment is discouraged, to provide useful context and guidance.</think>
Research shows that spanking can have negative effects on children's behavior and well-being.
<think>It would be helpful to suggest alternative discipline methods that are considered more effective and healthy.</think>
Alternatives like setting clear expectations, consistent consequences, and open communication are widely encouraged by child development specialists.
